steps.title: VP1: Open session, no console errors, assistant response renders
steps.output: Session loaded with 880 refs. Messages display text, tool calls (Bash, Read, Edit, Grep, Agent, Skill, TaskList, etc.), and reasoning blocks. No server errors after fixing assistant_config table initialization (Session.getPathLength() called before config query).

steps.title: VP1: Login, open session, messages display with text/tools/reasoning
steps.output: Logged in via chrome-devtools-axi, opened session 36320152-2833-4040-b838-97e7c82f4ca7. 196 expandable tool call buttons, reasoning sections with 'Thought for a few seconds' labels, text content blocks all visible.

steps.title: VP1: Refresh page, messages reload from Session.getHistory()
steps.output: After page refresh: 892 refs loaded (vs 880 before). Same content, no duplicates. Tool calls, text, and reasoning blocks all present.

steps.title: VP1: Close and reopen session tab, messages load instantly
steps.output: Closed tab (back to dashboard), reopened session. 886 refs loaded instantly. Same content, no duplicates. OPFS cache + DO sync working.

steps.title: VP2: No streaming-text or data-streaming selectors in DOM
steps.output: document.querySelectorAll('.streaming-text, [data-streaming]').length === 0. grep for StreamingText in source returns 0 results. Component fully removed.

steps.title: VP3: Tool calls render as collapsible with status badges
steps.output: 196 expandable tool call buttons. Expanded 'Bash Running' shows PARAMETERS heading with JSON input (command, description). Multiple tool types: Bash, Read, Edit, Grep, Agent, Skill, TaskList, TaskGet, TaskUpdate, ToolSearch.

steps.title: VP3: Tool error state renders with error output
steps.output: Code-level verification: ChatThread.tsx lines 151-155 handle 'output-error' state with ToolOutput errorText prop. Cannot trigger live error without executor, but code path verified.

steps.title: VP4: Message branching - rewind buttons present
steps.output: 254 'Rewind' buttons in DOM. MessageBranch component (ChatThread.tsx:31-57) renders prev/next navigation with branch count. Full send-edit-resubmit cycle requires executor.

steps.title: VP5: Attachment button in session input footer
steps.output: Found: <label aria-label='Attach image'>, <input type='file' aria-label='Upload files'>, second file input. Attachment UI present in session input area.

steps.title: Build verification
steps.output: pnpm build: 4/4 tasks successful. pnpm typecheck: passes after fixing sql parameter type in session-do-helpers.ts.

steps.title: Feature-specific tests pass
steps.output: bun test gateway-event-mapper.test.ts session-do.test.ts: 35 pass, 0 fail, 51 expect() calls. Pre-existing failures in unrelated tests (vi.resetModules/vi.hoisted bun:test incompatibility) not counted.
